emails.subject: Zach McCarroll
emails.body: Zach McCarroll Did you check on the fundies list to see if Zach is included? Let me know.

emails.subject: Zach McCarroll
emails.body: I have informed Zach McCarroll that he will not be offered a position with UBS. Hunter and I have discussed my favorable opinion of Zach as an Analyst and the possibility that we may be able to offer him a position in the event we have employees decline the offer. I would like to communicate with all of you over the weekend and on Tuesday to see if there will be a chance to offer him a position in Fundies. Mike Grigsby

emails.subject: RE: Zach McCarroll
emails.body: RE: Zach McCarroll Since Zac opens a spot, Jason Jennaro is a good candidate. To: Slone, Jeanie; Lavorato, John; Shively, Hunter S.
